---
title: "Projects"
subtitle: "A collection of my technical work in Data Analysis, IoT, and Visualization."
listing:
  contents:
    - "home-dashboard-grafana/index.qmd"
    - "home-solar-dashboard-grafana/index.qmd"
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories]
---

Welcome to my project portfolio. Here you'll find a mix of data science projects and personal technical experiments.
